content: Phase 3.2 rewrite shape: each new ai-summary carries 2 ship-specific facts (class/year/tonnage/capacity from page meta, body, or JSON-LD FAQ) plus 1 voice-aligned editorial line, ≤250 chars, then propagates to description + JSON-LD. Facts sourced from on-page content — no fabrication. Original 3.2a guess was 7 ships; tightened validator revealed 36 (3.2b) then 26 more (3.2c).

verification_meta.rationale: Protected operator anchor — household weight signal.
